ChangeRequest.name: Debt financing attribute to be moved to purpose member
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!--See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab)-->
### Overview
In LDM, currently the information regarding debt financing is a stand alone attribute in BIRD_FNNCL_ASST_INSTRMNT_LDM
![image.png](/uploads/60d94172558cdf61da52bee5bde6a238/image.png){width=374 height=366}
### Contact person
_\[_**_silvia.giacinti@ecb.europa.eu_**_\]_
### Description of change request
Delete the attribute DBT_FNNCNG_RGLTN867_2016_INDCTR in entity BIRD_FNNCL_ASST_INSTRMNT_LDM and create a member in attribute PRPS of the same entity
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
Entity BIRD_FNNCL_ASST_INSTRMNT_LDM
### Forward Engineering considerations
_\[Other considerations\]_
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
